scripts.setup:api: cd apps/api && bash -c 'if [ -f ../../.venv/bin/activate ]; then . ../../.venv/bin/activate; fi; python -m pip install -r requirements.txt'
scripts.dev:api: npm run setup:api && cd apps/api && bash -c 'if [ -f ../../.venv/bin/activate ]; then . ../../.venv/bin/activate; fi; python -m uvicorn src.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001'
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:preflight
scripts.test:preflight: cd packages/preflight && bash -c 'if [ -f ../../.venv/bin/activate ]; then . ../../.venv/bin/activate; fi; python -m pytest tests -v'
scripts.test:api: cd apps/api && bash -c 'if [ -f ../../.venv/bin/activate ]; then . ../../.venv/bin/activate; fi; python -m pytest tests -v'
scripts.test:e2e: cd apps/api && bash -c 'if [ -f ../../.venv/bin/activate ]; then . ../../.venv/bin/activate; fi; python -m pytest tests/test_e2e_pipeline.py tests/test_schema_inference.py tests/test_sample_files.py tests/test_catalog_api.py tests/test_connectors_flow.py -v'
scripts.docker:prod:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml logs -f api web
scripts.loop:enterprise: while true; do npm run test:e2e && npm run build && echo 'ENTERPRISE_LOOP_OK' || echo 'ENTERPRISE_LOOP_FAIL'; sleep 300; done
